rulings.Case Title: SHUFEN SU VS. JULIA ISABEL YUEH et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 13, 2012, line 1. CROSS DEFENDANTs JENNY WANG and LIEN WANG DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. Overrule, ten days to answer. Actural controversy exists regarding cross-defendant's status. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VASILIKI SERVETA VS. FINANCE AMERICA, LLC C/O MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 13, 2012, line 2. Attorney Richard C. Sinclair's Motion to Withdraw as Attorney of Record. Grant motion to withdraw. Court finds good cause - break down in attorney client relationship. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)
